raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "prescribing a procedural protocol for the phased withdrawal of verbal or mental interventions to achieve permanent transformation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "suggestive influence operates as a real causal force on non-physical or subtle levels of being",
    "progress toward wholeness is measurable by decreasing dependence on external or repeated prompts",
    "a final state of integration exists in which no further intervention is required",
    "the timing and spacing of interventions must be calibrated to an invisible inner rhythm of assimilation"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a tapering regimen but presupposes an unstated ontology in which 'suggestions' possess transferable efficacy that naturally exhausts itself",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the practitioner and subject must share a belief system in which repeated mental or spiritual commands can restructure subtle reality, and observable symptom relief must reliably correlate with reduced need for repetition",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the process is treated as universally applicable regardless of individual karmic, energetic, or psychological structure, or when symptom disappearance is mistaken for genuine ontological completion"
}
